title: Add deferred and rejected decision statuses

acceptance_criteria.text: The decision status vocabulary includes 'deferred' and 'rejected' in all three authoritative locations: DECISION_STATUSES in validate_repo.py and track_import.py, and the decision status enum in record-frontmatter.schema.json.
A validator test asserts that 'deferred' and 'rejected' validate as decision statuses while an unknown status still fails.
Decision 0017 records the rationale and the operator-approved frozen-surface change (INV-6); all gates (validate_repo, unittest, generate_dashboard, generate_spec) pass.
